description: search PubMed via NCBI E-utilities (ESearch + EFetch) and export results as JSON
rules: read-only — results written to record_store as pubmed.json
QUERY uses PubMed syntax (MeSH terms, field tags, Boolean operators)
LIMIT caps the number of retrieved records (default 100)
PUB_TYPES is a comma-separated publication-type filter (e.g. 'Review,Clinical Trial')
NCBI_EMAIL/NCBI_API_KEY env vars are honored to raise Entrez rate limits
porter degrades gracefully (writes {} and exits 0) when NCBI is unreachable
usage: Set QUERY. Optionally LIMIT, PUB_TYPES. Output: pubmed.json.
limitation: Requires network access to eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov. Rate-limited (3/sec, 10/sec with API key).
